calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Off Calendar

Mtn For Default Prove-Up; Notice
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-2 A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S).
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CECILIA REYES.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations filed in support of Request for Default Prove-Up are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $47,242.03
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $717.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $47,959.53
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Mar-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
